nuitka-compilation-report.exit_message:
implicit-imports: Error, failed to evaluate expression '["%s.management.commands.*" % x for x in get_variable("django_installed_apps")]' in this context, exception was 'NuitkaCalledProcessError(1, ['E:\PyCharm\Services\Finora\.venv\Scripts\python.exe', '-c', 'from __future__ import print_function
from __future__ import absolute_import
import os,sys

try:
 import os, importlib
 settings = importlib.import_module(os.getenv("PARAMETER_SETTINGS_MODULE")) if os.getenv("PARAMETER_SETTINGS_MODULE") else None
except ImportError as e:
 sys.stderr.write("\n%s" % repr(e))
 sys.exit(38)

if sys.version_info[0] >= 3:
 import builtins
else:
 import __builtin__ as builtins

_orig_import = builtins.__import__

_dummy_file = open(os.devnull, "w")

def _import_hook(*args, **kwargs):
 old_stdout = sys.stdout
 old_stderr = sys.stderr

 sys.stdout = _dummy_file
 sys.stderr = _dummy_file

 try:
 return _orig_import(*args, **kwargs)
 finally:
 sys.stdout = old_stdout
 sys.stderr = old_stderr

builtins.__import__ = _import_hook

try:
 print("-*-" * 15)
 print(repr(settings.INSTALLED_APPS if settings else ()))
 print("-" * 27)
 print(repr(tuple(v.rsplit(".",1)[0] for v in (getattr(settings, "MIDDLEWARE", ()) if settings else ()))))
 print("-" * 27)
 print(repr(tuple(db_conf["ENGINE"]+".base" for (name, db_conf) in sorted(settings.DATABASES.items())) if settings else ()))
 print("-" * 27)
 print(repr(getattr(settings, "ROOT_URLCONF", ()) if settings else ()))
 print("-" * 27)
 print(repr(getattr(settings, "SESSION_SERIALIZER", "django.contrib.sessions.serializers") if settings else "django.contrib.sessions.serializers"))
 print("-" * 27)
 print(repr(getattr(settings, "CSRF_FAILURE_VIEW", "django.views.csrf.csrf_failure").rsplit(".", 1)[0] if settings else "django.views.csrf"))
 print("-" * 27)
 print(repr(sum((tuple(v.rsplit(".",1)[0] for v in value.values()) for value in getattr(settings, "CACHES", {"": {"BACKEND": "django.core.cache.backends.locmem.LocMemCache"}}).values()), ())))
 print("-" * 27)
 print(repr(getattr(settings, "WSGI_APPLICATION", "django.core.handlers.wsgi.dummy").rsplit(".",1)[0] if settings else "django.core.handlers.wsgi"))
 print("-" * 27)
 print(repr(getattr(settings, "MESSAGE_STORAGE", "django.contrib.messages.storage.fallback.dummy").rsplit(".",1)[0] if settings else "django.contrib.messages.storage.fallback"))
 print("-" * 27)
except Exception as e:
 sys.stderr.write("\n%s" % repr(e))
 sys.exit(39)'])'.
